name: Hope Rifle I
description:
A light bowgun made specifically
for the expedition. Its rapid-fire
mechanism rains bullets on prey.

name: Hope Rifle II
description:
A light bowgun made specifically
for the expedition. Its rapid-fire
mechanism rains bullets on prey.

name: Hope Rifle III
description:
A light bowgun made specifically
for the expedition. Its rapid-fire
mechanism rains bullets on prey.

name: Hope Rifle IV
description:
A light bowgun made specifically
for the expedition. Its rapid fire
mechanism rains bullets on prey.

name: Hope Rifle V
description:
A light bowgun made specifically
for the expedition. Its rapid fire
mechanism rains bullets on prey.

name: Kut-Ku Anger I
description:
A light bowgun fashioned to
resemble the Yian Kut-Ku's
head and spew just as much
rage from its maw.

name: Kut-Ku Anger II
description:
A light bowgun fashioned to
resemble the Yian Kut-Ku's
head and spew just as much
rage from its maw.

name: Kut-Ku Counterattack
description:
The Kut-Ku Anger's upgraded
form. It can hold its own
against even a wyvern.
Take that, doubters!

name: Fäulnisschleuder I
description:
A light bowgun that contains the
Gore Magala's terrifying wails. It
fires round after hateful round.

name: Wahnschleuder
description:
An upgraded Fäulnisschleuder.
Each round is a cluster of
madness that rends prey with
demonic force.

name: Rey Szelatya I
description:
A light bowgun imbued with
Rey Dau's thunder. Its morphing
mechanism changes shape
to optimize firing.

name: Rey Szelatya II
description:
A light bowgun imbued with
Rey Dau's thunder. Its morphing
mechanism changes shape
to optimize firing.

name: Rey Szelatya III
description:
A light bowgun imbued with
Rey Dau's thunder. Its morphing
mechanism changes shape
to optimize firing.

name: Szelatya Clairgun
description:
An upgraded Rey Szelatya. May its
scintillating bolts scorch the sky
and rip the very earth apart.

name: Rasasa Bowgun I
description:
A light bowgun resembling
the tail of a Seregios. Its
barrage of rounds rain down
on oppressors like falling stars.

name: Rebel Stopper
description:
An upgraded Rasasa Bowgun.
Its shots are guaranteed to end
any rebellion that may arise.

name: Dosha Faithbreaker I
description:
A Doshaguma light bowgun.
Light on the trigger, it pumps
projectiles into quarry with
astonishing ease.

name: Dosha Faithbreaker II
description:
A Doshaguma light bowgun.
Light on the trigger, it pumps
projectiles into quarry with
astonishing ease.

name: Dosha Faithbreaker III
description:
A Doshaguma light bowgun.
Light on the trigger, it pumps
projectiles into quarry with
astonishing ease.

name: Dosha Gigasbreaker I
description:
A Guardian Doshaguma light
bowgun. To its defiers it shows
no mercy, gruesomely returning
them to nature.

name: Dosha Gigasbreaker II
description:
A Guardian Doshaguma light
bowgun. To its defiers it shows
no mercy, gruesomely returning
them to nature.

name: Gigasbreaker Urbolkule
description:
An upgraded Dosha Gigasbreaker.
Its destructive impulses transform
wielders into violence incarnate.

name: Chain Blitz I
description:
A light bowgun with a simple, but
reliable, iron construction that is
issued to new hunters on the field.

name: Chain Blitz II
description:
A light bowgun with a simple, but
reliable, iron construction that is
issued to new hunters on the field.

name: Chain Blitz III
description:
A light bowgun with a simple, but
reliable, iron construction that is
issued to new hunters on the field.

name: High Chain Blitz
description:
For this upgraded Chain Blitz,
they used high-grade ore and
returned to square one for
the firing mechanism.

name: Titan Launcher I
description:
A Gravios light bowgun designed
to support a variety of potent
ammo for maximum offensive
capability.

name: Titan Panzer
description:
An upgraded Titan Launcher.
A single shot delivers the same
power as a giant magazine.

name: G. Rathling Gun I
description:
A Guardian Rathalos light
bowgun. Like a blazing fire,
its wielder's spirit never
abates.

name: G. Rathling Gun II
description:
A Guardian Rathalos light
bowgun. Like a blazing fire,
its wielder's spirit never
abates.

name: White Rathling Phoenix
description:
An upgraded G. Rathling Gun.
A regal soul rests within its
immaculate flood of power.

name: Rathling Gun I
description:
A Rathalos light bowgun. Its
blasts of scorching fire are
as relentless as the Lord of
the Skies himself.

name: Rathling Phoenix
description:
An upgraded Rathling Gun.
Foes tremble before it in vain
until they are reduced to dust.

name: Assault Conga I
description:
A guerilla-grade light bowgun
that uses Congalala spoils.
Oh, the fur shock absorber?
It's flame-retardant.

name: Assault Conga II
description:
A guerilla-grade light bowgun
that uses Congalala spoils.
Oh, the fur shock absorber?
It's flame-retardant.

name: Combat Conga
description:
An upgraded Assault Conga,
specially treated to stay in top
condition in harsh environments.

name: Tail String I
description:
A light bowgun covered in white
Blangonga fur. Its rounds rip
through prey like a violent
blizzard.

name: Tail Catapult
description:
An upgraded Tail String that
uses superior materials,
overwhelming prey with
an avalanche of gunfire.

name: Valkyrie Fire I
description:
A stunning light bowgun that
savages targets with fire, like
a Rathian alighting on her prey.

name: Valkyrie Fire II
description:
A stunning light bowgun that
savages targets with fire, like
a Rathian alighting on her prey.

name: Valkyrie Flame
description:
An upgraded Valkyrie Fire.
All who defy the queen are
mowed down in a swath of
exquisite pain.

name: Hunter's Rifle I
description:
A light bowgun crafted from
a medley of bones. Consistent
performance and zero bulk make
it great for novices.

name: Hunter's Rifle II
description:
A light bowgun crafted from
a medley of bones. Consistent
performance and zero bulk make
it great for novices.

name: Hunter's Rifle III
description:
A light bowgun crafted from
a medley of bones. Consistent
performance and zero bulk make
it great for novices.

name: Hunter's Rifle IV
description:
A light bowgun crafted from
a medley of bones. Consistent
performance and zero bulk make
it great for novices.

name: Power Rifle
description:
Only quality bones are used in
this upgraded Hunter's Rifle,
lending it superior response
and handling.

name: Felling Fulgur I
description:
A Guardian Fulgur Anjanath light
bowgun. Only one able to tame
its brutality through reason can
wield it.

name: Fulgursnipe Guardiana
description:
An upgraded Felling Fulgur.
Its savage urges thwart reason
and will destroy an overeager
wielder.

name: Chthonian Gunfire I
description:
A Guardian Ebony Odogaron light
bowgun. Beholden to beastly
cravings, its thirst for blood
never wanes.

name: Chthonian Gunfire II
description:
A Guardian Ebony Odogaron light
bowgun. Beholden to beastly
cravings, its thirst for blood
never wanes.

name: Bequeathed Animus
description:
An upgraded Chthonian Gunfire.
Despite chewing free of its cycle
of hunger, the beast remains
unsated.

name: Ajara Shellgun I
description:
An Ajarakan light bowgun.
Each projectile must endure
the barrel's searing heat
before escaping.

name: Ajara Shellgun II
description:
An Ajarakan light bowgun.
Each projectile must endure
the barrel's searing heat
before escaping.

name: Ajara-Angaja
description:
An upgraded Ajara Shellgun.
In the hands of a lesser smith,
the materials would overheat
and explode.

name: Nu Chobotnice I
description:
A Nu Udra light bowgun.
From the darkness it takes
aim, its prey left unaware of
the threat it faces.

name: Nu Chobotnice II
description:
A Nu Udra light bowgun.
From the darkness it takes
aim, its prey left unaware of
the threat it faces.

name: Abaddonian Chobotnice
description:
An upgraded Nu Chobotnice.
Each shot from the abyss
screams forth like a
nightmarish messenger.

name: Windshear Light I
description:
A Hirabami light bowgun that
produces wind in the barrel to
fire rounds at lightning speed.

name: Windshear Light II
description:
A Hirabami light bowgun that
produces wind in the barrel to
fire rounds at lightning speed.

name: Windshear Light III
description:
A Hirabami light bowgun that
produces wind in the barrel to
fire rounds at lightning speed.

name: Windshear Uchibami
description:
An upgraded Windshear Light
that can find its mark even in the
midst of the harshest windstorm.

name: G. Veldian Impetum I
description:
A light bowgun made from
Guardian spoils. It galvanizes
the body with unknown power,
assuring accuracy.

name: G. Veldian Impetum II
description:
A light bowgun made from
Guardian spoils. It galvanizes
the body with unknown power,
assuring accuracy.

name: G. Expiating Caius
description:
An upgraded G. Veldian Impetum.
It echoes finality across the sky
in an angelic song of salvation.

name: Veldian Impetum I
description:
An Arkveld light bowgun.
In ancient days, a knight used
such a weapon to gain renown
as a wyvern hunter.

name: Artian Blaster I
description:
A weapon assembled from
unearthed fragments. It has a
mechanism that adjusts bullet
force for each target.

name: Artian Blaster II
description:
A weapon assembled from
unearthed fragments. It has a
mechanism that adjusts bullet
force for each target.

name: Animilater
description:
An ancient weapon with latent
potential. Not even the souls of
prey are safe from its bullets.

name: Zoh Kaiah I
description:
A Zoh Shia light bowgun that
thirsts for adventure.
Its barrel flashes with each
fierce, indiscriminate shot.

name: Blazing Kaiah
description:
Kaiah harketh from on high:
Thou who seekest adventure,
may thy deathly barrage
deny thy cycle of rebirth.

name: Esperanza Rifle
description:
A fully field-tested Hope Rifle.
Like rain in times of drought, it
restores hope to the battlefield.

name: Faithbreaker Leibolkule
description:
An upgraded Dosha Faithbreaker.
Its gunfire rips through quarry as
mercilessly as a stampede.

name: Expiating Caius
description:
An upgraded Veldian Impetum.
Even giant wyverns fall when faced
with its storms of precise bullets.

name: Desolate Mist I
description:
A weapon used by a warrior
who once fought for peace.
Scatters enemies like fog.

name: Nifl Mist
description:
An enhanced Desolate Mist.
It knows not the fog's
evanescence, only its power.

name: Thundacrus I
description:
A light bowgun made of
Lagiacrus parts. Its majestic
barrel can fire high voltage
electricity.

name: Thundacrus Rex
description:
An upgraded Thundacrus.
Electrical power courses
through it, making it the
epitome of fear itself.

name: Bethorned Agony
description:
As guilt swallows all, these
thorns shall bind and punish
your pitiable soul.

name: Bethorned Agony
description:
As guilt swallows all, these
thorns shall bind and punish
your pitiable soul.

name: Bethorned Agony
description:
As guilt swallows all, these
thorns shall bind and punish
your pitiable soul.
